metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1345
metadata.comment:
Rationale: CPEB4 is detected in the PSD fraction from IP from hippocampal neurons 21 DIV. Adittionally, CPEB4 immunofluorescence seems to be enriched in areas juxtaposed to synaptophysin-positive pre-synapses (primary rat hippocampal neurons as decribed in Huang et al., 2002).

24/9/2017 Pim
- Literal: "Finally, both CPEB3 and CPEB4, when fused to GFP, were detected in dendrites, often as puncta (Figure 5C)"
- Literal: "Taken together, these data show that CPEB3 and CPEB4 are expressed in only partially overlapping regions of the brain; within hippocampal neurons, where both are expressed, they appear to be synaptic."
- The mRNA translation data is too poorly shown in this paper lacking clear synaptic relevance although looking at AMPAR translation.. Experimental description: 24/9/2017 Pim
- Information on tissues and OE constructs used in Fig.5 are not stated by the authors. Authors contacted in email dd. 24/9/2017 (Joel.Richter@umassmed.edu). Answer:

"rat" cultured neurons.
GFP-hCPEB3 and GFP-hCPEB4 (human).
Thank, Yi-Shuian
- Rat species was selected based on the localization in the PSD fraction.
